summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Approval Search and Email Templates CRUD. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - search bars, template CRUD, and template loading all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor hydration warning from select options rendering, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/approvals returns list of approvals
Backend: GET /api/approvals?search=product filters results correctly
Backend: Empty search returns all pending approvals
Backend: Search is case insensitive
Backend: GET /api/templates returns list of templates
Backend: POST /api/templates creates new template with id, name, subject, body, created_at
Backend: Created template appears in GET /api/templates list
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{id} removes template
Backend: DELETE non-existent template returns 404
Backend: Template with empty body is allowed
Backend: Existing endpoints (brands, stats, agentmail, activity) still work
Frontend: Approval Queue search bar visible on Approvals page
Frontend: Approval search filters results as user types (debounced)
Frontend: Approval search clear button (X) resets search
Frontend: Compose dialog Templates button toggles template list
Frontend: Save as Template button appears when subject/body filled
Frontend: Save template form accepts name and saves template
Frontend: Clicking template in list loads subject and body into compose fields
Frontend: Delete template button visible for each template
Frontend: Inbox messages view has search/filter bar
Frontend: Inbox search filters messages client-side
Frontend: Inbox search clear button resets filter
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in ComposeDialog select - consider using plain text instead of dynamic spans in option elements
seed_data_creation: Created test templates during testing (prefixed with TEST_) - cleanup fixture removes them
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features (approval search, email templates) fully tested and working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py covers all CRUD operations for templates and search functionality for approvals. AgentMail integration is real (not mocked).
